Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/professional-colleague-agents-en/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "professional-colleague-agents-en"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. professional-colleague-agents-en

_Файлов:_ 13

h2. Содержание

* [[00-abstract|00-abstract.md]] — 
* [[01-five-type-typology|01-five-type-typology.md]] — 
* [[02-what-makes-pca|02-what-makes-pca.md]] — 
* [[03-empirical-case-obuchay|03-empirical-case-obuchay.md]] — 
* [[04-architecture|04-architecture.md]] — 
* [[05-economics-replication|05-economics-replication.md]] — 
* [[06-risks|06-risks.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[07-application-domains|07-application-domains.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[08-pilot-sgb-advocate|08-pilot-sgb-advocate.md]] — 
* [[09-relationship-other-agents|09-relationship-other-agents.md]] — 
* [[10-open-questions|10-open-questions.md]] — 
* [[11-call-for-collaboration|11-call-for-collaboration.md]] — 
* [[12-closing|12-closing.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[211-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.37)

* [[README]] (сходство 0.30)
